case_title: CALIFORNIA CULINARY ACADEMY, INC. VS RICHARDSON KIMBERLY P.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,739.20 FILED BY CALIFORNIA CULINARY ACADEMY, INC. FBNSNO. 161875 EXPIRES: 04/22/97 AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARDSON KIMBERLY P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-20-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $45.00 AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARDSON KIMBERLY P.
